title: WOMEN'S CRISIS SUPPORT TEAM - 211info
text: WOMEN'S CRISIS SUPPORT TEAM WOMEN'S CRISIS SUPPORT TEAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis line, an emergency safe shelter for up to 13, and advocacy for survivors of domestic violence, stalking, and sexual assault. Offers prevention education in area high schools and throughout the community. The shelter has both individual and shared rooms. There are separate areas for men and women, with or without children. 612 NW 5th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Crisis line and advocacy: Survivors of domestic violence, sexual assault, and stalking Shelter: Women or men, women or men and their children Hours: Crisis line and in-person response: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, holiday hours may vary Email (541) 479-9349 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (541) 479-9349 Administration (541) 476-3877 Toll-free (800) 750-9278 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: South Douglas, West Jackson, and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Josephine Community Transit bus routes 10, 20, 35, and 40 stop at the Transit Hub three blocks away. Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines Domestic Violence Shelters Sexual Assault Hotlines Sexual Assault Prevention Sexual Assault Shelters Spouse/Intimate Partner Abuse Prevention If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
